items.caption: A screenshot of a news segment with a red stamp that reads "fake" superimposed over a glass jar containing what appears to be marijuana. the text on the screen below the jar states "weed kills corona virus" and "scientist are shocked to discover that weed kills corona virus." the background is blurred, but it seems to be a news studio setting. the overall style of the image suggests it is meant to be humorous or satirical, as the claim about weed curing coronavirus is not supported by scientific evidence.
